summary: Iteration 30 - 10-Category Pre-Match Prediction Model testing complete. All 12 backend tests passed. Backend implements new 10-category model with research-validated weights (Squad 22%, Form 18%, Venue 16%, H2H 10%, Toss 8%, Matchups 8%, Bowling 7%, Injury 5%, Conditions 4%, Momentum 2%). Injury override API (POST/GET/DELETE) working. TOSS_LOOKUP contains all 8 required venues. Frontend displays all 10 factor labels correctly. Cached predictions still use old 11-factor model - new predictions will use 10-category model.

minor.issue: Cached predictions use old 11-factor model structure. New predictions will use 10-category model.

issues: Cached predictions show old factor weights. New predictions will show correct 10-category weights.

passed_tests: Backend: API health check - version 4.1.0, dataSource: Claude Opus + Web Scraping
Backend: compute_prediction returns all 10 factors (squad_strength, current_form, venue_pitch_home, h2h, toss_impact, matchup_index, bowling_depth, injury_availability, conditions, momentum)
Backend: TOSS_LOOKUP contains all 8 required venues (wankhede, chepauk, chinnaswamy, narendra_modi, eden_gardens, arun_jaitley, rajiv_gandhi, mohali)
Backend: TOSS_LOOKUP structure verified (city, default_decision, conditions with preferred/toss_win_pct)
Backend: POST /api/matches/{id}/injury-override creates injury override in DB
Backend: GET /api/matches/{id}/injury-overrides returns list of overrides
Backend: ai_service.py fetch_pre_match_stats prompt includes 'injuries' field in JSON schema
Backend: ai_service.py enforces '2023-2026' data constraint in fetch_pre_match_stats prompt
Backend: Injury overrides affect compute_prediction (team1_impact increases when injury added)
Frontend: PreMatch page renders with data-testid='pre-match-page'
Frontend: Combined Prediction Block visible with data-testid='combined-prediction-block'

Frontend: All 10 factor labels displayed correctly (Squad Strength & Balance, Current Season Form, Venue + Pitch + Home, Head-to-Head (2023-26), Toss Impact (Venue), Key Player Matchups, Bowling Depth & Balance, Injuries & Availability, Conditions (Dew/Weather), Momentum & Psychology)
action_items: Consider running 'Re-Predict All' to regenerate cached predictions with new 10-category model weights
critical_code_review_comments: pre_match_predictor.py correctly implements 10-category model with WEIGHTS dict summing to 1.0
TOSS_LOOKUP contains venue-specific toss data for 10 IPL venues with conditions and chasing_bias
compute_prediction accepts injury_overrides parameter and passes to _compute_injury_impact
server.py lines 1159-1206 implement injury override CRUD endpoints correctly
server.py line 1095 passes injury_overrides to compute_prediction during pre-match predict
ai_service.py lines 473-548 fetch_pre_match_stats includes injuries field and 2023-2026 constraint
PreMatchPredictionBreakdown.js displays all 10 factors with correct labels and default weights
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Jasprit Bumrah injury override for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 features verified. The 10-category pre-match model is implemented in pre_match_predictor.py with weights: Squad 22%, Form 18%, Venue 16%, H2H 10%, Toss 8%, Matchups 8%, Bowling 7%, Injury 5%, Conditions 4%, Momentum 2%. Injury override API endpoints work correctly. TOSS_LOOKUP contains venue-specific toss data. Cached predictions in DB still have old 11-factor structure - new predictions will use the new 10-category model. MI vs RR (ipl2026_013) is an upcoming match good for testing.
